{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322080546300498AF2836AA92AD9F"}"},"total":28},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7564056453822006041","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前为止还可以，叙事紧促，没有雷点，最主要的是没有那些莫名其妙的“爱情”，主旨就是围绕国运战场，杀伐果断，背景国家和大部分人民都相信主角李夜，支持李夜的决定，也给了李夜在战场上最大的的权利，还有就是，一开始，主角就知道自己是怎么过来平行世界的，始皇也表示如果此次国运失败，会平安将李夜送回原世界
没有让责任全部压在李夜身上，所有人都在自己擅长的领域默默反击
赞赞赞","text_exts":[{"e":52,"s":48,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774137946AA92AD9F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227564056453822006041%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227460430538382265369%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761146567,"group_id":"7460430538382265369","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2iASQQnrv33sStH34lcXvUK+NGw9SCrOxq5l0V+Kwr6","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2465559714731392","user_name":"易如反掌的李仙花"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2465559714731392","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7460430538382265369","book_info":{"abstract":"【国运擂台】降临！
胜者灵气复苏，山河拓展，开启超凡时代！
败者亡国灭种，永不超生！
平行世界的华夏历史一朝断层，无一人识得历史上的文臣武将君王！
国运战场屡战屡败，连输三年！面对已成修行者文明的外邦大军压境，即将亡国！
关键时刻，穿越者李夜站了出来。
于国运擂台之上，重现华夏历史，召唤华夏名将：吕布，裴旻，霍去病，王玄策，关羽……召唤文臣诸葛武侯，张良，姚广孝，刘伯温……召唤帝王大魔法师刘秀，始皇帝嬴政等！
从此华夏连败的历史结束，战无不胜的纪元开始了！
而整个世界都将在华夏厚重的历史底蕴下瑟瑟发抖，迎接苏醒的东方古国的怒火！
犯我华夏者，虽远必诛！
欲亡华夏者，必为华夏所灭！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/411d25e0518aa8e5abeb9f8ec2455fe5","author":"大灰羊吃小狼","author_id":"","book_id":"7460430538382265369","book_name":"一人守国门，谁言华夏无历史？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1727人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7460430590177706521","read_count":"1727","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"331346"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.8","serial_count":"153","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越,国运","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/54a7d61daa55e26a81e659081f8585a7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779321946&x-signature=lbMNAQsxAxgq03gRTnUxAel3rHY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2406204685167981","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"150"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322080546300498AF2836AA92AD9F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15169,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":968},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7553832390199640894","comm
